title: Ageratina ixiocladon
taxonomy: Ageratina ixiocladon is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Ageratina, which is a group of plants commonly known as ironweed. The genus Ageratina is part of the tribe Eupatorieae, a group of plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes daisies, sunflowers, and many other species. Ageratina ixiocladon is native to Central America.
